requirement_topic.en: Lithium-Ion Cell and Battery Safety for Industrial Applications (Estonia / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 工业应用锂离子电芯与电池安全（爱沙尼亚／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 工業應用鋰離子電芯與電池安全（愛沙尼亞／歐盟）

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 sets safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, including BESS. It covers abuse testing (overcharge, over-discharge, short-circuit, thermal, crush), BMS requirements, and marking. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU requires harmonised standard compliance; EN IEC 62619 is listed in the LVD Official Journal as a harmonised standard. EN IEC 63056 covers secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems. In Estonia, EVS (Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation) adopts EN/IEC standards as EVS-EN standards; EN IEC 62619 is available as EVS-EN IEC 62619. Cold-climate performance validation is a practical market expectation for Estonia: cells and battery packs must demonstrate safe operation at low temperatures (down to −30 °C for outdoor or unheated enclosure installations), including capacity retention, charge acceptance, and thermal management at sub-zero temperatures.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022 规定了工业应用（含BESS）二次锂电芯与电池组的安全要求，涵盖滥用测试（过充、过放、短路、热冲击、挤压）、电池管理系统要求及标识。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU获取CE标志须符合相应协调标准；EN IEC 62619已列入低电压指令官方公报协调标准清单。EN IEC 63056规定用于电气储能系统的二次锂电芯与电池安全要求。在爱沙尼亚，EVS（爱沙尼亚标准化与认可中心）以EVS-EN标准的形式采用EN/IEC标准；EN IEC 62619以EVS-EN IEC 62619形式提供。低温性能验证是爱沙尼亚市场的实际预期：电芯和电池包须证明在低温环境下（室外或非保温外壳安装可低至-30°C）的安全运行，包括零度以下的容量保持、充电接受能力和热管理性能。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022 規定工業應用（含BESS）二次鋰電芯與電池組的安全要求，涵蓋濫用測試（過充、過放、短路、熱衝擊、擠壓）、電池管理系統要求及標識。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌須符合相應協調標準；EN IEC 62619已列入低電壓指令官方公報協調標準清單。EN IEC 63056規定用於電氣儲能系統的二次鋰電芯與電池安全要求。在愛沙尼亞，EVS（愛沙尼亞標準化與認可中心）以EVS-EN標準形式採用EN/IEC標準；EN IEC 62619以EVS-EN IEC 62619形式提供。低溫性能驗證是愛沙尼亞市場的實際預期：電芯和電池包須證明在低溫環境下（室外或非保溫外殼安裝可低至-30°C）的安全運行，包括零度以下的容量保持、充電接受能力和熱管理性能。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 62619:2022 (adopted in Estonia as EVS-EN IEC 62619)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (EU Battery Regulation) — lifecycle, due-diligence, and carbon-footprint requirements for industrial batteries

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (Electric Energy Storage Lithium-Ion Batteries) is a recommended Chinese national standard for lithium-ion batteries used in power energy storage systems. It specifies safety performance requirements including electrical, mechanical, environmental, and abuse tests for cells and battery packs, but its GB/T status means it is not itself the compulsory national requirement. China's compulsory cell and battery safety standard for electric energy storage is GB 44240-2024. Testing expectations may still reference GB/T 36276 in projects or procurement, but mandatory-status conclusions should be based on GB 44240-2024 and the applicable regulator or grid-operator requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）是中国推荐性国家标准，适用于电力储能系统用锂离子电池，规定电芯及电池组的安全性能要求，包括电气、机械、环境及滥用测试；但其GB/T属性意味着该标准本身并非强制性国家要求。中国针对电力储能用电芯及电池安全的强制性标准为GB 44240-2024。项目或采购要求仍可能引用GB/T 36276，但判断强制属性时应以GB 44240-2024及适用监管机构或电网企业要求为依据。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）是中國推薦性國家標準，適用於電力儲能系統用鋰離子電池，規定電芯及電池組的安全性能要求，包括電氣、機械、環境及濫用測試；但其GB/T屬性意味著該標準本身並非強制性國家要求。中國針對電力儲能用電芯及電池安全的強制性標準為GB 44240-2024。項目或採購要求仍可能引用GB/T 36276，但判斷強制屬性時應以GB 44240-2024及適用監管機構或電網企業要求為依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — recommended national standard for electric energy storage lithium-ion batteries
GB 44240-2024 — compulsory safety requirement for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 36276 / GB 44240 test protocols and pass/fail criteria differ from EN IEC 62619 in several areas: nail penetration test conditions, thermal runaway propagation testing (required by EN IEC 62619 Annex C, not directly equivalent), and BMS functional safety depth. EU importers require a Declaration of Conformity and technical file under LVD; Chinese test reports or certificates are not recognised by EU notified bodies as substitutes. Additionally for Estonia: low-temperature performance test data is expected for cold-climate deployment (−30 °C ambient). Standard Chinese GB/T test conditions do not include systematic low-temperature capacity and safety characterisation at sub-zero temperatures typical of Estonian winters. EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence documentation is not required under Chinese national standards.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 36276/GB 44240与EN IEC 62619在多项测试协议和判定准则上存在差异：针刺测试条件、热失控蔓延测试（EN IEC 62619附录C要求，未形成直接等同关系）、电池管理系统功能安全深度。欧盟进口商依据低电压指令须提供符合性声明及技术文件；中国检测报告或证书不被欧盟通知机构认可为替代依据。此外，针对爱沙尼亚：低温气候部署需要提供低温性能测试数据（-30°C环境温度）。标准中国GB/T测试条件不包括在典型爱沙尼亚冬季零度以下温度的系统性低温容量和安全表征。欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期和尽职调查文件在中国国家标准中没有对应要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 36276/GB 44240與EN IEC 62619在多項測試協議和判定準則上存在差異：針刺測試條件、熱失控蔓延測試（EN IEC 62619附錄C要求，未形成直接等同關係）、電池管理系統功能安全深度。歐盟進口商依據低電壓指令須提供符合性聲明及技術文件；中國檢測報告或證書不被歐盟公告機構認可為替代依據。此外，針對愛沙尼亞：低溫氣候部署需要提供低溫性能測試數據（-30°C環境溫度）。標準中國GB/T測試條件不包括在典型愛沙尼亞冬季零度以下溫度的系統性低溫容量和安全表徵。歐盟電池法規2023/1542的生命週期和盡職調查文件在中國國家標準中沒有對應要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for market access in EU including Estonia; EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 adds lifecycle and due-diligence obligations. EVS adopts EN standards as EVS-EN standards; no Estonia-specific deviations from EU framework are known for BESS cell safety.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is the compulsory national cell/battery safety requirement; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended (GB/T) and may be referenced by projects or procurement

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 or GB 44240-2024 evidence does not satisfy EU LVD requirements for Estonia. Separate EN IEC 62619:2022 and/or EN IEC 63056:2020 testing at an EU-recognised laboratory, issuance of an EU Declaration of Conformity, and cold-climate performance documentation for Estonia's −30 °C conditions are required before placing BESS on the Estonian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024证据不满足爱沙尼亚欧盟低电压指令要求。须在欧盟认可实验室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020测试，出具欧盟符合性声明，并提供爱沙尼亚-30°C条件的低温性能文件，方可在爱沙尼亚市场销售BESS产品。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024證據不滿足愛沙尼亞歐盟低電壓指令要求。須在歐盟認可實驗室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020測試，出具歐盟符合性聲明，並提供愛沙尼亞-30°C條件的低溫性能文件，方可在愛沙尼亞市場銷售BESS產品。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Safety — System Level (Estonia / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 电池储能系统（BESS）整机安全（爱沙尼亚／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 電池儲能系統（BESS）整機安全（愛沙尼亞／歐盟）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 defines system-level safety requirements for BESS connected to the grid, including hazard identification, risk assessment, thermal runaway propagation prevention, fire suppression, and installation safety. Under EU law, compliance with the essential safety requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is mandatory; harmonised standards such as IEC/EN 62933-5-2 provide a presumption of conformity only when their references are published in the EU Official Journal. The EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposes lifecycle, due-diligence, and carbon-footprint requirements on industrial batteries. For Estonia specifically: the Technical Regulatory Authority (Tehnilise Järelevalve Amet, TJA) oversees electrical safety and building-code compliance; the Competition Authority (Konkurentsiamet) regulates energy markets and generation/storage licensing; large-scale BESS installations may require a generation licence or registration with Konkurentsiamet under the Estonian Electricity Market Act (Elektrituruseadus).
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020规定BESS系统级安全要求，涵盖危害识别、风险评估、热失控蔓延防护、消防及安装安全。依据欧盟法律，遵守低电压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求属强制义务；IEC/EN 62933-5-2等协调标准仅在其参考编号发布于欧盟官方公报时方可推定合规。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542另对工业电池提出全生命周期、尽职调查及碳足迹要求。就爱沙尼亚而言：技术监管局（TJA）负责监督电气安全和建筑规范合规；竞争管理局（Konkurentsiamet）负责监管能源市场和发电/储能许可；大型BESS装置可能需要依据爱沙尼亚《电力市场法》（Elektrituruseadus）向竞争管理局申领发电许可或完成注册。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020規定BESS系統級安全要求，涵蓋危害識別、風險評估、熱失控蔓延防護、消防及安裝安全。依據歐盟法律，遵守低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求屬強制義務；IEC/EN 62933-5-2等協調標準僅在其參考編號發布於歐盟官方公報時方可推定合規。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542另對工業電池提出全生命週期、盡職調查及碳足跡要求。就愛沙尼亞而言：技術監管局（TJA）負責監督電氣安全和建築規範合規；競爭管理局（Konkurentsiamet）負責監管能源市場和發電/儲能許可；大型BESS裝置可能需要依據愛沙尼亞《電力市場法》（Elektrituruseadus）向競爭管理局申領發電許可或完成登記。

standards_or_laws: Konkurentsiamet (Estonian Competition Authority) — energy generation and storage licensing

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electric Energy Storage Systems Connected to Power Systems) specifies system-level technical and safety requirements for grid-connected BESS in China, including electrical performance, protection, communication, and safety functions. It is a recommended (non-mandatory) national standard but is referenced in grid-connection agreements with State Grid and China Southern Power Grid, making it effectively mandatory for grid-connected projects. As of mid-2026, no Chinese national standard contains thermal runaway propagation prevention test requirements directly equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 Annex B; this gap is a recognised regulatory difference between the Chinese and EU frameworks.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）规定中国并网储能系统的系统级技术与安全要求，包括电气性能、保护、通信及安全功能。该标准为推荐性国家标准，但在国家电网和南方电网的并网协议中被引用，使其对并网项目实际上具有强制效力。截至2026年中，中国国家标准中尚无与IEC 62933-5-2附录B直接对应的热失控蔓延防护测试要求；这一差距是中欧监管框架之间已获认可的差异。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）規定中國並網儲能系統的系統級技術與安全要求，包括電氣性能、保護、通信及安全功能。該標準為推薦性國家標準，但在國家電網和南方電網的並網協議中被引用，使其對並網項目實際上具有強制效力。截至2026年中，中國國家標準中尚無與IEC 62933-5-2附錄B直接對應的熱失控蔓延防護測試要求；這一差距是中歐監管框架之間已獲認可的差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage (supersedes GB/T 34131-2017; recommended national standard)

gap.en: IEC 62933-5-2 thermal runaway propagation prevention requirements (Annex B) and fire-suppression system mandates have no direct equivalent in Chinese national standards as of mid-2026. EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposes due-diligence, carbon footprint declaration, and battery passport requirements not present in Chinese regulation. For Estonia specifically: Konkurentsiamet licensing (energy market authority) and TJA building-code compliance are additional national-layer requirements beyond the EU minimum. Chinese exporters must conduct system-level risk assessment per IEC 62933-5-2 and obtain EU DoC; GB/T 36558 compliance reports are not accepted as EU/Estonia market-access evidence.
gap.zh: IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延防护要求（附录B）及消防系统强制规定在截至2026年中的中国国家标准中无直接对应。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542对尽职调查、碳足迹声明及电池护照的要求在中国法规中亦无对应。就爱沙尼亚而言：竞争管理局（Konkurentsiamet）许可（能源市场监管机构）及TJA建筑规范合规是超出欧盟最低要求的额外国家层级要求。中国出口商须按IEC 62933-5-2进行系统级风险评估并取得欧盟符合性声明；GB/T 36558合规报告不被接受为欧盟/爱沙尼亚市场准入证明。
gap.zht: IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延防護要求（附錄B）及消防系統強制規定在截至2026年中的中國國家標準中無直接對應。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542對盡職調查、碳足跡聲明及電池護照的要求在中國法規中亦無對應。就愛沙尼亞而言：競爭管理局（Konkurentsiamet）許可（能源市場監管機構）及TJA建築規範合規是超出歐盟最低要求的額外國家層級要求。中國出口商須按IEC 62933-5-2進行系統級風險評估並取得歐盟符合性聲明；GB/T 36558合規報告不被接受為歐盟/愛沙尼亞市場準入證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the essential requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is legally required for EU/Estonia market access; Konkurentsiamet licensing and TJA building-permit compliance are additional Estonia-national requirements for large BESS installations.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) but effectively mandatory for grid-connection approval by State Grid / China Southern Power Grid

source.publisher: Competition Authority (Konkurentsiamet) — Estonian energy regulatory authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 compliance does not satisfy EU/Estonia requirements. EU market access requires CE marking and satisfaction of the essential safety requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. For Estonia, additionally verify Konkurentsiamet licensing requirements and TJA building-permit requirements for the specific installation. EU Declaration of Conformity, technical file, and battery passport (from 18 February 2027) are all required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558合规不满足欧盟/爱沙尼亚要求。进入欧盟/爱沙尼亚市场须取得CE标志，并满足低电压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求。对于爱沙尼亚，还需额外核实竞争管理局（Konkurentsiamet）许可要求及具体安装的TJA建筑许可要求。欧盟符合性声明、技术文件及电池护照（自2027年2月18日起）均为必须。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558合規不滿足歐盟/愛沙尼亞要求。進入歐盟/愛沙尼亞市場須取得CE標誌，並滿足低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求。對於愛沙尼亞，還需額外核實競爭管理局（Konkurentsiamet）許可要求及具體安裝的TJA建築許可要求。歐盟符合性聲明、技術文件及電池護照（自2027年2月18日起）均為必須。

requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Directive — Electrical Safety for BESS Equipment (Estonia / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 低电压指令——BESS设备电气安全（爱沙尼亚／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 低電壓指令——BESS設備電氣安全（愛沙尼亞／歐盟）

summary.en: LVD 2014/35/EU requires all electrical equipment operating between 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC placed on the EU market to be safe and CE marked. For BESS, this covers the battery system, inverter/PCS, switchgear, and enclosures. The manufacturer must prepare a technical file, conduct conformity assessment (typically internal production control for harmonised-standard-covered products), and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity. Harmonised standards EN IEC 62619, EN IEC 63056, and IEC 62933-5-2 provide presumption of conformity with LVD essential safety requirements. In Estonia, EVS adopts EN standards as EVS-EN standards; compliance with the EU framework satisfies EVS requirements. Documentation in Estonian language may be required for final installation manuals and end-user materials; technical files and DoC may remain in English.
summary.zh: 低电压指令2014/35/EU要求在欧盟市场销售的所有工作电压在50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC范围内的电气设备须安全并加贴CE标志。对于BESS，该指令适用于电池系统、逆变器/PCS、开关设备及外壳。制造商须准备技术文件，进行符合性评估（协调标准覆盖产品通常为内部生产控制），并出具欧盟符合性声明。EN IEC 62619、EN IEC 63056及IEC 62933-5-2协调标准可推定符合低电压指令基本安全要求。在爱沙尼亚，EVS以EVS-EN标准形式采用EN标准；符合欧盟框架即满足EVS要求。最终安装手册和终端用户材料可能需要爱沙尼亚语版本；技术文件和符合性声明可保留英语版本。
summary.zht: 低電壓指令2014/35/EU要求在歐盟市場銷售的所有工作電壓在50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC範圍內的電氣設備須安全並加貼CE標誌。對於BESS，該指令適用於電池系統、逆變器/PCS、開關設備及外殼。製造商須準備技術文件，進行符合性評估（協調標準覆蓋產品通常為內部生產控制），並出具歐盟符合性聲明。EN IEC 62619、EN IEC 63056及IEC 62933-5-2協調標準可推定符合低電壓指令基本安全要求。在愛沙尼亞，EVS以EVS-EN標準形式採用EN標準；符合歐盟框架即滿足EVS要求。最終安裝手冊和終端用戶材料可能需要愛沙尼亞語版本；技術文件和符合性聲明可保留英語版本。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 62619:2022 (adopted as EVS-EN IEC 62619 in Estonia)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the LVD CE-marking framework. Electrical safety for BESS in China is governed by GB 44240-2024 for compulsory cell/battery safety, GB/T 36276-2023 as a recommended cell/battery safety standard, GB/T 36558-2023 at system level, and sector-specific grid-connection technical specifications issued by State Grid Corporation and China Southern Power Grid. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to certain electrical products — stationary BESS systems have not been brought into CCC scope under any publicly confirmed CNCA announcement as of mid-2026; verify with CNCA for any post-2025 changes.
summary.zh: 中国没有与低电压指令CE标志框架直接对应的制度。BESS电气安全由GB 44240-2024规范强制性电芯/电池安全要求，GB/T 36276-2023作为推荐性电芯/电池安全标准，GB/T 36558-2023规范系统层面要求，并由国家电网、南方电网发布的行业并网技术规范共同约束。截至2026年中，固定式BESS系统尚未在任何经公开确认的CNCA公告中纳入CCC范围；如需确认2025年后是否有变化，请向CNCA核实。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與低電壓指令CE標誌框架直接對應的制度。BESS電氣安全由GB 44240-2024規範強制性電芯/電池安全要求，GB/T 36276-2023作為推薦性電芯/電池安全標準，GB/T 36558-2023規範系統層面要求，並由國家電網、南方電網發布的行業並網技術規範共同約束。截至2026年中，固定式BESS系統尚未在任何經公開確認的CNCA公告中納入CCC範圍；如需確認2025年後是否有變化，請向CNCA核實。

standards_or_laws: CCC (3C) certification scheme (stationary BESS has not been brought into CCC scope under any publicly confirmed CNCA announcement as of mid-2026)

gap.en: China's project-approval and grid-operator review model does not produce the product-level EU DoC and technical file required by LVD 2014/35/EU. Chinese exporters must appoint an EU Authorised Representative, compile an LVD-compliant technical file (risk assessment, test reports to harmonised standards, instructions), and self-declare or engage a notified body. No bilateral mutual recognition agreement (MRA) covers electrical safety between China and the EU for BESS products. For Estonia: the port of entry is the Port of Tallinn / Muuga Harbour; import customs require standard EU documentation; no Estonia-specific BESS import permit exists beyond standard EU CE requirements.
gap.zh: 中国的项目核准和电网企业审查模式不产生低电压指令2014/35/EU所要求的产品级欧盟符合性声明及技术文件。中国出口商须在欧盟指定授权代表，编制符合低电压指令的技术文件（风险评估、协调标准测试报告、说明书），并进行自我声明或委托通知机构。中欧之间就BESS产品电气安全尚无双边互认协议。对于爱沙尼亚：入境港为塔林港/穆加港；进口海关要求标准欧盟文件；除标准欧盟CE要求外，爱沙尼亚没有特定的BESS进口许可。
gap.zht: 中國的項目核准和電網企業審查模式不產生低電壓指令2014/35/EU所要求的產品級歐盟符合性聲明及技術文件。中國出口商須在歐盟指定授權代表，編制符合低電壓指令的技術文件（風險評估、協調標準測試報告、說明書），並進行自我聲明或委託公告機構。中歐之間就BESS產品電氣安全尚無雙邊互認協議。對於愛沙尼亞：入境港為塔林港/穆加港；進口海關要求標準歐盟文件；除標準歐盟CE要求外，愛沙尼亞沒有特定的BESS進口許可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LVD 2014/35/EU is a binding EU directive; CE marking is a legal prerequisite for EU market access including Estonia; Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 adds battery-specific obligations
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory CE/LVD framework; safety governed through project-approval and grid-operator review processes

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese safety approvals (NEA project approval, grid-operator certificates, GB 36276 test reports) do not constitute LVD compliance for Estonia. EU market access requires a product-level EU Declaration of Conformity, an LVD-compliant technical file, CE marking, and an appointed EU Authorised Representative. Port of entry for Estonia is the Port of Tallinn / Muuga Harbour.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国安全批准文件（国家能源局项目核准、电网企业证书、GB 36276测试报告）不构成爱沙尼亚低电压指令合规。进入爱沙尼亚/欧盟市场须具备产品级欧盟符合性声明、符合低电压指令的技术文件、CE标志，并指定欧盟授权代表。爱沙尼亚入境港为塔林港/穆加港。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國安全批准文件（國家能源局項目核准、電網企業證書、GB 36276測試報告）不構成愛沙尼亞低電壓指令合規。進入愛沙尼亞/歐盟市場須具備產品級歐盟符合性聲明、符合低電壓指令的技術文件、CE標誌，並指定歐盟授權代表。愛沙尼亞入境港為塔林港/穆加港。
